2124370.name: Fantasy Grounds - Devin Night Token Pack 155: Heroic Characters 30
2124370.description:
Devin Night Token Pack 155: Heroic Characters 30

Tantalizing Tiefling tricksters, Darding Drow Duelists and Heroic Human heroes await your gaming table! This collection of brave adventurers has 39 tokens of various classes, races and genders, so stock up on supreme support for your NPC needs now!

Adapted for Fantasy Grounds by: James Holloway
Requires: The free Fantasy Grounds virtual tabletop (VTT) software and any ruleset.
Screenshots may differ from what you see in-game based on the extension and ruleset you have loaded.
